category.scope_note: Electric and cordless hand-held, transportable, and lawn/garden power tools of Chinese origin assessed for placement on the Botswana market against the China domestic baseline.

title.en: China-to-Botswana Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入博茨瓦纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入波札那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Botswana requirements: BOBS conformity assessment, BOS adopted standards, electrical safety, EMC, noise, restricted substances, and battery handling for cordless tools.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与博茨瓦纳要求差距对照：BOBS 符合性评定、BOS 采用标准、电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声、限用物质及无绳工具电池处理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與波札那要求差距對照：BOBS 符合性評定、BOS 採用標準、電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲、限用物質及無繩工具電池處理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Botswana law, BOBS and BOS requirements, BOCRA radio rules, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行博茨瓦纳法律、BOBS 与 BOS 要求、BOCRA 无线电规则及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行波札那法律、BOBS 與 BOS 要求、BOCRA 無線電規則及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Botswana, the mandatory baseline is conformity assessment and import inspection under the Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) using BOS standards that adopt IEC and SANS, with BOS/IEC 62841 as the core safety reference and BOCRA type approval for the radio function of cordless tools. There is no Botswana equivalent of the EU outdoor-noise product marking scheme, so noise is handled through general product-safety and standards conformity rather than a dedicated noise-marking law.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入博茨瓦纳，强制基线是由博茨瓦纳标准局（BOBS）依据采用 IEC 和 SANS 的 BOS 标准进行符合性评定和进口检验，核心安全参考为 BOS/IEC 62841，无绳工具的无线电功能还需 BOCRA 型号核准。博茨瓦纳没有与欧盟户外噪声产品标识制度等同的法规，因此噪声通过一般产品安全和标准符合性处理，而非专门的噪声标识法。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入波札那，強制基線是由波札那標準局（BOBS）依據採用 IEC 和 SANS 的 BOS 標準進行符合性評定和進口檢驗，核心安全參考為 BOS/IEC 62841，無繩工具的無線電功能還需 BOCRA 型號核准。波札那沒有與歐盟戶外噪聲產品標識制度等同的法規，因此噪聲透過一般產品安全和標準符合性處理，而非專門的噪聲標識法。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or on regulatory change, whichever is sooner
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed remains false until a named reviewer confirms each Botswana source against the current BOBS, BOS, and BOCRA position.
